mapper.insert: INSERT INTO articles (user_id, title, content, cover_image) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{coverImage})
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u.username FROM articles a LEFT JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.status = 1
SELECT a.*, u.username FROM articles a LEFT JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.status = 1 ORDER BY a.created_time DESC
SELECT a.*, u.username FROM articles a LEFT JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.status = 1 ORDER BY a.created_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE articles SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE articles SET like_count = like_count + #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE articles SET status = 2 WHERE id = #{id}
